steps: First, convert the words to figures. 'Two million, forty thousand and seven hundred and six' means 2,000,000 + 40,000 + 700 + 6 = 2,040,706 km. 'One million, nine hundred and ninety-nine thousand and sixty' means 1,000,000 + 999,000 + 60 = 1,999,060 km. Difference = 2,040,706 - 1,999,060 = 41,646 km. Check options: 41,646 km is option B.
